siteMeta.title: HAILAN — Global Decorative Building Materials Manufacturer
siteMeta.description: HAILAN designs and manufactures LVT flooring, PET wall coverings and PET carpet coverings for importers, distributors and brands in more than 20 countries.

lvt-flooring.name: LVT Flooring
lvt-flooring.short: Luxury vinyl tile and plank with high-definition decors, register embossing and wear layers built for demanding commercial traffic.

pet-wall-coverings.name: PET Wall Coverings
pet-wall-coverings.short: Polyester acoustic felt panels — flat sheets, slat systems and CNC-cut shapes — with up to 60% recycled content.

pet-carpet-coverings.name: PET Carpet Coverings
pet-carpet-coverings.short: Modular carpet tiles and planks tufted from solution-dyed PET yarn — inherently stain-resistant, colourfast and specification-ready.

hero.lede: HAILAN designs, produces and exports LVT flooring, PET wall coverings, PET carpet coverings and a growing range of surface materials for B2B partners worldwide.
hero.badge: ISO 9001 · FloorScore® · CE — Exporting to 20+ countries

intro.title: A manufacturing partner built for global brands.
intro.para1: HAILAN is a global decorative building materials manufacturer headquartered in Jinhua, China. From an integrated production campus in Zhejiang, we develop, produce and export LVT flooring, PET acoustic wall coverings and PET carpet coverings.
intro.para2: Our products carry other people’s names as often as our own. For importers, retail chains and home-improvement brands on every continent, HAILAN is the quiet capability behind the label: stable quality, honest lead times and a team that treats your program like its own.

productsHome.title: Three product lines. One quality system.
productsHome.lede: Floor, wall and textile surfaces developed under a single engineering and compliance standard — so partners can build complete interior programs from one factory.

manufacturingHome.title: Precision at industrial scale.
manufacturingHome.lede: One integrated campus takes raw polymer and fibre through to finished, packed, batch-coded product — nothing critical is outsourced.

pillars.title: Automated production
pillars.text: 25 extrusion, calendering and tufting lines run under MES tracking, with laser thickness gauging in-line — not after the fact.

pillars.title: In-line quality control
pillars.text: Dimensional, surface and colour checks every production hour, recorded against the batch code that ships on every carton.

pillars.title: R&D and tooling
pillars.text: In-house decor development, embossing plates and a laboratory press turn a partner’s idea into a factory-exact sample in days.

pillars.title: OEM capability
pillars.text: A dedicated sampling studio and bilingual project managers carry private-label programs from first brief to loaded container.

why.title: The capability behind labels and projects worldwide.
why.lede: Partners rarely switch suppliers over price. They switch over surprises. Our job is to remove them.

reasons.title: Reliable supply
reasons.text: Capacity is planned around partner forecasts, with safety stock held on running programs. Across the last three years, 98.6% of containers shipped on or before the confirmed date.

reasons.title: Stable quality
reasons.text: One quality system governs every line. Products are batch-coded, lab-verified and visually inspected — so the hundredth container matches the first sample you approved.

reasons.title: Global experience
reasons.text: Certification, documentation, packaging and logistics are tuned to each destination — from EU REACH and CE marking to US FloorScore and Gulf conformity schemes.

reasons.title: Professional team
reasons.text: English-speaking project managers and engineers answer in hours, not days — and stay with your program through reorders, redesigns and market shifts.

markets.title: Shipped from one campus. Installed on six continents.
markets.lede: Export is not a department at HAILAN — it is built into the way we work. Documentation, load plans and port logistics are engineered with the same care as the product.

cta.title: Request free samples for your next program.
cta.lede: Tell us what you are sourcing — product type, market, quantity and target specification. Our export team will reply within one business day.

footer.tagline: Jinhua Hailan New Materials Co., Ltd. — a global manufacturer of decorative building materials, supplying partners in more than 20 countries from an approximately 33,000 m² production campus.

meta.title: About
meta.description: HAILAN — Jinhua Hailan New Materials Co., Ltd. — is a global decorative building materials manufacturer supplying LVT flooring, PET wall coverings and PET carpet coverings to partners in 20+ countries.

hero.title: A factory that thinks like a brand.
hero.lede: Jinhua Hailan New Materials Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures and exports decorative building materials from an integrated campus in Jinhua, China — for partners who put their own name on the box.

story.title: Built from a Zhejiang manufacturing base.
story.para1: HAILAN was founded in 2020 in Jindong District, Jinhua, Zhejiang. Growing from a dedicated manufacturing base shaped how we work: close to suppliers, tooling partners and testing resources, with export standards setting the bar for every production program.
story.para2: From the beginning we chose a narrower, deeper path than most: fewer product categories, engineered properly, produced on our own lines and documented to the standards of the strictest destination market. First LVT flooring, then PET acoustic wall coverings, then PET carpet coverings — three surfaces, one quality system.
story.para3: Today our products are installed in offices, hotels, schools and homes in more than 20 countries — usually under our partners’ brands. That is by design. HAILAN’s ambition is to be the most dependable manufacturer behind the world’s decorative building material brands, and increasingly, a brand worth asking for by name.

values.title: Four principles govern every program.
values.lede: They are not wall posters. They are the operating rules our partners experience in every quotation, sample and container.

items.title: Engineering first
items.text: Every product decision starts on the production line, not the brochure. If a construction cannot be manufactured consistently at scale, we do not sell it.

items.title: Radical reliability
items.text: Partners plan seasons, store openings and project schedules around our confirmations. We treat a confirmed date as a contract — 98.6% of containers ship on time.

items.title: Design fluency
items.text: We read the same trend reports, visit the same fairs and track the same architecture press as our customers — so decor development speaks their language.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.text: Our repeat programs are planned as long-term partnerships. We price, plan and invest for relationships measured in years, not purchase orders.

items.title: Founded in Jindong District
items.text: Jinhua Hailan New Materials is established in Jindong District, Jinhua, Zhejiang, with a focus on decorative building materials manufacturing.

items.title: Integrated production campus
items.text: The Jinhua campus consolidates flooring, wall covering and warehouse operations on one coordinated site.

items.title: Export programs begin
items.text: Dedicated export workflows are built for overseas importers, with international sales and documentation support.

items.title: Product portfolio expands
items.text: PET wall coverings and PET carpet coverings extend the offer from flooring into broader interior surface materials.

items.title: OEM / ODM process upgraded
items.text: Sampling, packaging, documentation and project handoff are standardized for private-label partners.

items.title: Sampling capability strengthened
items.text: A dedicated sampling workflow compresses decor development and sample confirmation cycles for OEM programs.

compliance.title: Certified for the strictest destination.
compliance.text: Every product line is developed against the regulatory requirements of the European Union, North America and the Gulf — then documented so partners can specify, import and install without friction.

cta.title: Meet the team behind the label.
cta.lede: Visit our campus in Jinhua, meet us at the next trade fair, or start with a conversation about your program.

meta.title: Products
meta.description: LVT flooring, PET acoustic wall coverings and PET carpet coverings — three product lines engineered under one quality system for importers, distributors and brands worldwide.

hero.title: Floor. Wall. Textile. One standard.
hero.lede: Three product lines developed under a single engineering and compliance system — so partners can build complete interior programs from one factory, one contact and one shipping schedule.

roadmap.title: One category at a time, engineered properly.
roadmap.text: HAILAN’s roadmap extends beyond flooring and acoustic surfaces into the broader world of decorative building materials. New categories join the portfolio the same way the current three did: developed on our own lines, validated against international standards, and offered to partners only when we can guarantee them at scale.

cta.title: Need specifications, pricing or samples?
cta.lede: Send us your project or program requirements — technical data sheets and sample dispatch within days.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Talk to HAILAN’s export team about distribution, OEM programs or project supply. We respond within one business day.

hero.title: Let’s talk about your program.
hero.lede: Distribution, private label, project supply or a single technical question — the fastest way to evaluate HAILAN is to start a conversation.

contactPage.visits: Factory visits and audits welcome by appointment.

expectations.title: Response within 24 hours
expectations.text: A named export manager — not an autoresponder — replies within one business day.

expectations.title: Specifications & pricing
expectations.text: You receive technical data, indicative pricing and honest lead times for your market.

expectations.title: Samples on their way
expectations.text: Standard samples dispatch within days; custom sampling runs 7–10 days from approved artwork.

meta.title: Manufacturing
meta.description: Inside HAILAN's 120,000 m² integrated campus: 25 production lines, MES-tracked automation and in-line quality control from raw polymer to batch-coded, export-packed product.

hero.title: From raw polymer to loaded container. One campus.
hero.lede: Nothing critical is outsourced. Extrusion, lamination, tufting, profiling, inspection and packing all happen on one MES-tracked site in Jinhua — which is why the hundredth container matches the first.

process.title: Six stages. Zero handoffs outside our control.
process.lede: Each stage feeds measurement data forward to the next — so problems are corrected at the source, not discovered at inspection.

steps.title: Material preparation
steps.text: Virgin and certified-recycled polymer, plasticiser, stabiliser and fibre are batched by recipe, with every incoming lot tested against specification before release to production.

steps.title: Extrusion & calendering
steps.text: Twin-screw extruders and four-roll calenders form core and wear layers to tolerance, with in-line laser thickness gauging feeding corrections back to the line in real time.

steps.title: Lamination & pressing
steps.text: Decor film, wear layer and core are bonded under heat and pressure. Register-embossing plates align surface texture to the printed decor for natural depth.

steps.title: Surface treatment & UV curing
steps.text: Polyurethane coatings are applied and UV-cured to the gloss level and scratch resistance each program specifies — matte to satin, verified by gloss meter every hour.

steps.title: Precision profiling
steps.text: CNC double-end tenoners cut click profiles, bevels and formats to ±0.15 mm. PET panels move through routing cells for slats, perforations and project geometries.

steps.title: Inspection, packing & loading
steps.text: Every piece passes visual and dimensional inspection before batch-coded cartons are palletised, load-planned and containerised — photographed at every loading stage.

automation.title: Machines measure. People decide.
automation.lede: Automation at HAILAN is not about removing people — it is about removing variance. Instruments watch every metre of production so our engineers can act on data, not guesswork.

items.title: MES production tracking
items.text: Every order is tracked through the manufacturing execution system from raw material lot to container number — the same data partners see in shipment documentation.

items.title: In-line measurement
items.text: Laser thickness gauges, colour spectrophotometers and vision systems measure continuously during production, not on samples after the fact.

items.title: Automated handling
items.text: Robotic palletising and AGV transfer between lines reduce handling damage and keep surface quality consistent through packing.

items.title: Energy & water systems
items.text: Rooftop photovoltaics supply 22% of electricity; a closed-loop system on the calendering lines cut process water intake by 17% year over year.

logistics.title: Engineered up to the ship's rail.
logistics.text: Manufacturing excellence means nothing if the container arrives late or damaged. Our logistics team load-plans every shipment for weight limits and mixed-product programs, produces destination-correct export documentation, and photographs each loading stage. Shanghai and Ningbo ports are within three hours of the campus.

cta.title: Audit us. Seriously.
cta.lede: The fastest way to trust a factory is to walk it. We host partner audits and factory visits year-round — or start with a live video tour.

meta.title: OEM / ODM
meta.description: Private-label and custom development programs for flooring and acoustic surfaces: in-house decor development, 7–10 day sampling, retail-ready packaging and full compliance packs.

hero.title: Your brand. Our factory. One accountable partner.
hero.lede: Most of what HAILAN produces carries our partners' names. Private-label and custom development are not a side business — they are the business, with a studio, team and process built specifically for it.

process.title: From first brief to loaded container in six steps.
process.lede: Every step has a named owner, a deliverable and a timeline — so you always know where your program stands.

steps.title: Brief & feasibility
steps.text: Share your market, price position, target constructions and volumes. Within days you receive a feasibility read: what we recommend, what it costs and how fast it ships.

steps.title: Decor & construction development
steps.text: Our design studio develops decors, colourways and surface textures to your brand direction — or engineers your existing range for better cost and performance.

steps.title: Sampling
steps.text: The dedicated sampling studio produces factory-exact samples on laboratory equipment — the construction you approve is the construction that ships.

steps.title: Pilot production
steps.text: A pilot run validates the construction at line speed. You receive pilot samples, full lab results and final packaging proofs before committing to volume.

steps.title: Mass production
steps.text: Production is scheduled against your forecast, tracked in MES and inspected at every gate. Standard lead times run 25–35 days from order confirmation.

steps.title: Logistics & reorders
steps.text: Load-planned containers, destination-correct documents and photographed loading. Running programs hold safety stock and tooling for fast reorders.

services.eyebrow: What we take off your plate
services.title: Everything between your idea and your warehouse.

items.title: Private-label manufacturing
items.text: Your brand, your packaging, your specifications — produced under our quality system. From carton artwork to display boards, everything ships retail-ready.

items.title: Custom product development
items.text: New constructions, thicknesses, formats and acoustic targets engineered to your market's price point — with our tooling, film library and fibre suppliers behind it.

items.title: Decor & colour studio
items.text: In-house designers track European and North American interior trends and translate them into wood, stone, textile and abstract decors exclusive to your program.

items.title: Merchandising & sampling
items.text: Sample boards, folders, chain sets and shop displays produced in the same studio as the product — matched to your artwork and shipped with first orders.

items.title: Compliance ownership
items.text: We maintain the certificates your market demands — CE, FloorScore®, REACH, fire classification — and ship a complete compliance pack with every program.

items.title: Program management
items.text: One English-speaking project manager owns your program from brief to reorder, with a 24-hour response commitment and full visibility into production status.

assurances.title: Built on protections, not promises.
assurances.intro: A private-label relationship only works when the brand owner is protected. These commitments are written into every OEM and ODM agreement we sign:
points: Your designs and decors remain your property — exclusivity is contractual
Transparent constructions: full material specifications disclosed
Pilot approval before any volume commitment
Safety stock and tooling reserved for running programs

cta.title: Bring us your next range.
cta.lede: A construction target, a competitor sample or just a price point — that's enough to start. Feasibility feedback within days, samples within two weeks.

meta.title: Quality
meta.description: One quality system governs every HAILAN line: incoming material testing, hourly in-line checks, laboratory verification and full batch traceability from raw material lot to container.

hero.title: The hundredth container must match the first sample.
hero.lede: That single sentence is our entire quality philosophy. Everything on this page — the gates, the laboratory, the traceability — exists to make it true, shipment after shipment.

gates.title: Four gates between raw material and your warehouse.
gates.lede: Quality is not a department that inspects at the end. It is a series of gates a product must pass through — and each gate keeps records.

items.title: Incoming materials
items.text: Every lot of polymer, film, yarn and additive is sampled and tested against purchase specification before release. Non-conforming lots are quarantined and returned — they never reach a line.

items.title: In-line, every hour
items.text: Thickness, dimensions, colour delta-E, gloss and surface quality are measured hourly on every running line and logged against the batch code. Drift triggers correction at the machine, not at final inspection.

items.title: Laboratory verification
items.text: Our on-site laboratory runs wear, dimensional stability, curl, peel strength, acoustic and colourfastness tests on every production batch — to the same ISO, EN and ASTM methods third-party labs use.

items.title: Pre-shipment inspection
items.text: Finished goods are inspected to AQL 2.5 before packing, and again at container loading with photographic records. Partners receive inspection data with their shipping documents.

lab.title: Tested to the methods your market regulates.
lab.lede: Our laboratory runs the same ISO, EN and ASTM procedures as the certification bodies — so third-party results never surprise us, or you.
lab.caption: Laboratory tests and their reference standards

trace.title: Every carton answers for itself.
trace.para1: Every carton HAILAN ships carries a batch code that resolves — inside our MES — to the raw material lots, the production line, the shift, the in-line measurements and the laboratory results behind it. If a partner ever raises a claim, we answer with data within 48 hours, not with opinions.
trace.para2: The same records feed our continuous improvement loop: claim rates, first-pass yield and colour consistency are reviewed weekly by the same engineers who run the lines.

certs.title: Documentation that clears customs and specifications.
certs.lede: Certificates are maintained continuously and shipped as a compliance pack with every program — ready for importers, specifiers and retail chains.

cta.title: Request our compliance pack.
cta.lede: Test reports, certificates and technical data sheets for any product line — organised by destination market, delivered within one business day.
